meaning: v.沟通,通信,(房间、道路、花园等)相通,传达,感染
examples: They can communicate even when they strongly disagree.
They successfully communicate their knowledge to others.
Now he can only communicate through a voice synthesizer.
Ability to write in a clear and concise manner and to communicate effectively orally.
But we want to help people use pictures, store and retrieve pictures, transmit and communicate pictures.
